# @verevoir/editor

> React components for content editing. Renders forms from block definitions. Depends on `@verevoir/schema`.

## Install

```bash
npm install @verevoir/editor
```

Peer dependencies: `react`, `react-dom`.

## Core Components

### BlockEditor

Renders a complete editing form from a block definition. Reads field metadata (labels, types, validation) to select appropriate input components.

```tsx
import { BlockEditor, useBlockForm } from '@verevoir/editor';
import { article } from './blocks';

function ArticleEditor({ value, onChange }) {
  const [state, actions] = useBlockForm(article, value, onChange);
  return <BlockEditor block={article} state={state} actions={actions} />;
}
```

### useBlockForm(block, value, onChange)

Hook that returns `[state, actions]` for form state management. Handles nested updates for objects and arrays.

### Field Components

Individual field editors, rendered automatically by BlockEditor but also usable standalone:

- `TextField` — single-line input
- `RichTextField` — rich text editor (HTML)
- `NumberField` — numeric input
- `BooleanField` — checkbox
- `SelectField` — dropdown
- `ArrayField` — list with add/remove/reorder
- `ObjectField` — nested fieldset
- `ReferenceField` — select dropdown from provided options

## Context Providers

### ReferenceOptionsProvider

Provides options for `ReferenceField` dropdowns.

```tsx
<ReferenceOptionsProvider options={{ author: [{ id: '1', label: 'Alice' }] }}>
  <BlockEditor ... />
</ReferenceOptionsProvider>
```

### LinkSearchProvider

Async search for internal document linking in RichTextField.

```tsx
<LinkSearchProvider onSearch={async (query) => results}>
  <BlockEditor ... />
</LinkSearchProvider>
```

`LinkSearchResult`: `{ id: string; url: string; title: string; blockType: string }`

### CopyAssistProvider

AI-powered copy generation for rich text fields. When provided, RichTextField shows a suggest button.

```tsx
<CopyAssistProvider onGenerate={async (request) => htmlString}>
  <BlockEditor ... />
</CopyAssistProvider>
```

`CopyAssistRequest`: `{ fieldName, fieldLabel, hint, currentValue, context }`

## Publishing

### publishFields()

Returns shared status/publishFrom/publishTo field definitions for any block.

```typescript
import { publishFields } from '@verevoir/editor';

const page = defineBlock({
  name: 'page',
  fields: {
    title: text('Title'),
    ...publishFields(),
  },
});
```

### isLive(data, now?)

Checks if content is visible: `status === 'published'` and within the optional time window.

## Content Controls

Pre-built polymorphic content blocks for page builders:

- `heroControl` — hero section with heading, subheading, CTA
- `contentControl` — rich text content block
- `carouselControl` — image carousel

Each has a `ControlDefinition` with `type`, `label`, `block`, and `Renderer`.

## PreviewFrame

Viewport-switching preview component with zoom support.

```tsx
import { PreviewFrame } from '@verevoir/editor';

<PreviewFrame src={previewUrl} />
```

## Styling

Optional CSS shipped via subpath export `@verevoir/editor/styles/*`. Components use `data-block`, `data-field`, `data-array-item` attributes for styling.

## Utilities

- `markdownToHtml(markdown)` — convert markdown to HTML
- `htmlToMarkdown(html)` — convert HTML to markdown
- `unwrapSchema(field)` — extract Zod schema from field definition
- `inferUIHint(field)` — determine UI hint from field type

## SSR / Server Component Warning

**DO NOT import `@verevoir/editor` in Next.js server components, server actions, or any server-side code.** The package has `createContext()` calls at module scope that fail outside a browser React environment with `createContext is not a function`.

This affects `publishFields` and `isLive` — even though they don't use React, importing them pulls in the full module.

**Fix:** Copy `publishFields` and `isLive` into a local file that only imports from `@verevoir/schema`:

```typescript
// lib/publishing.ts (server-safe)
import { select, text } from '@verevoir/schema';

export function publishFields() {
  return {
    status: select('Status', ['draft', 'published', 'archived']).default('draft'),
    publishFrom: text('Publish From').optional(),
    publishTo: text('Publish To').optional(),
  };
}

export function isLive(
  data: { status?: unknown; publishFrom?: unknown; publishTo?: unknown },
  now: Date = new Date(),
): boolean {
  if (data.status !== 'published') return false;
  if (data.publishFrom && new Date(String(data.publishFrom)) > now) return false;
  if (data.publishTo && new Date(String(data.publishTo)) < now) return false;
  return true;
}
```

Only import `@verevoir/editor` in `'use client'` components.
